# Chess Tournament Calendar

> A calendar of classical and rapid chess tournaments from around the world. Tournament data is sourced from chess-results.com and updated automatically every 12 hours.

This site lists upcoming, open-entry chess tournaments (both classical and rapid time controls), including dates, location, duration, number of players registered, and time control information.

## Pages

- [Tournament Calendar](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/): Full list of upcoming chess tournaments worldwide, filterable by country, month, duration, and time control (Classical / Rapid). Also available in [Spanish](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/es/), [Portuguese](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/pt/), [German](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/de/), [Czech](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/cs/), and [Finnish](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/fi/).
- [Continent pages](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/continent/europe/): Tournaments filtered to one continent (e.g. Europe, Asia), each linking to its countries. Available for every continent with active tournaments.
- [Country pages](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/country/finland/): Tournaments filtered to one country. Available for every country with active tournaments.
- [Contact & Feedback](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/contact): Send feedback, report issues, or enquire about tournament partnerships.

## Data

- [Tournament data (JSON)](https://chesstournamentcalendar.com/data/tournaments.json): Machine-readable list of all tournaments. Updated every 12 hours.

## Details

Each tournament entry includes:
- Name and registration/info link
- Start and end dates
- City and country
- Duration in days
- Time control (Classical or Rapid)
- Number of players currently registered (when available)

The page embeds structured data (schema.org Event, JSON-LD) for each tournament listed.
